classification.reasoning: The patch introduces a new class DelayableWriteChannel with complex synchronization and delayed write logic, modifies multiple existing classes to integrate this new channel type, and changes the message dispatching and execution flow in PostgresWireProtocol to handle delayed writes. It also updates ResultSetReceiver and RowCountReceiver to work with delayed writes. The changes involve deep structural modifications to the protocol handling and message ordering mechanisms, indicating significant API divergence and refactoring rather than simple string or formatting changes. The patch is large and touches many files with non-trivial logic, so it is classified as TYPE_IV with high confidence. The token budget estimate is high due to the complexity and size of the patch.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new class DelayableWriteChannel that wraps a Netty Channel to allow delaying writes until explicitly flushed or discarded.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide a mechanism to buffer outgoing writes and control when they are actually sent, preventing out-of-order writes in asynchronous scenarios.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of io.crate.session.Sessions.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To include Sessions class for later usage in the file.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed unused import of io.crate.session.Sessions.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Clean up unused imports to reduce clutter.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed setting of child channel option AUTO_READ to false on bootstrap.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To change channel auto-read behavior, possibly to enable automatic reading of inbound data.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Simplified pipeline setup by directly adding a new Netty4MessageChannelHandler instance instead of assigning it to a variable first; removed explicit channel option AUTO_READ set to true.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Streamline channel pipeline setup and possibly rely on default channel options.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of DelayableWriteChannel.DelayedWrites.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use DelayedWrites type in this class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the channel field type from Channel to DelayableWriteChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable delaying writes on the channel by wrapping it with DelayableWriteChannel.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified ReadyForQueryCallback constructor to remove the Runnable parameter and only keep Channel and TransactionState fields.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify callback by removing the read Runnable, likely because reading is handled differently now.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed invocation of read.run() in ReadyForQueryCallback.accept method.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Adjust callback behavior to no longer trigger read explicitly, possibly due to changed read management.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Wrapped the channel from ChannelHandlerContext into a new DelayableWriteChannel instance upon channel registration.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use DelayableWriteChannel wrapper for all channel operations to support delayed writes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed ChannelHandlerContext parameter from dispatchState and dispatchMessage calls and methods, passing only ByteBuf and DelayableWriteChannel instead.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify method signatures and adapt to use DelayableWriteChannel instead of raw Channel and context.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed calls to ctx.read() from dispatchState and dispatchMessage methods.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Shift responsibility for reading from context out of these methods, likely to better control flow with delayed writes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed ChannelHandlerContext parameter from dispatchMessage and related handler methods; removed calls to ctx.read(); replaced Channel with DelayableWriteChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Adapt message dispatching to use DelayableWriteChannel and remove direct context reads to better coordinate asynchronous writes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed ctx.read() call after sending error response for unsupported message types.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Prevent automatic reading after error to better control channel state.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced lambda parameter name from underscore (_) to f in chained listeners after sending AuthenticationOK message.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Minor code style change for clarity or consistency.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed handleExecute method signature to remove ChannelHandlerContext and replace Channel with DelayableWriteChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Adapt method to use DelayableWriteChannel for delayed write support and simplify parameters.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced delaying of writes by creating a DelayedWrites instance from the channel before executing queries; added comments explaining the need to delay writes to preserve message order.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Prevent out-of-order message sending by buffering writes during asynchronous query execution.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added DelayedWrites parameter to RowCountReceiver constructor call in handleExecute.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Pass delayedWrites to RowCountReceiver to coordinate delayed write flushing.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added DelayedWrites parameter to ResultSetReceiver constructor call and removed handling of pendingExecution future and ctx.read() calls.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Integrate delayed writes into ResultSetReceiver and simplify asynchronous execution flow by removing explicit read calls.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: In handleSync, replaced ctx.read() calls with channel.writePendingMessages() and removed ctx parameter; added call to discardDelayedWrites on error before sending error response.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Flush all delayed writes upon sync and properly discard delayed writes on error to maintain channel consistency.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed handleSimpleQuery method signature to remove Runnable read parameter and replace Channel with DelayableWriteChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Adapt method to use DelayableWriteChannel and remove explicit read callback.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed read.run() call after sending error response in handleSimpleQuery catch block.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Avoid triggering read explicitly after error, consistent with other changes to read management.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed ReadyForQueryCallback instantiation to remove read Runnable and use DelayableWriteChannel instead of Channel in handleSimpleQuery and handleSingleQuery signatures.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Adapt to use DelayableWriteChannel and simplify callback interface.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added delayedWrites creation and passed it to RowCountReceiver constructor in describe message handling.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enable delayed writes buffering during describe message execution to maintain message order.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added delayedWrites creation and passed it to ResultSetReceiver constructor in describe message handling.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enable delayed writes buffering during describe message execution for result sets.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added call to channel.discardDelayedWrites() before sending error response in handleSingleQuery catch block.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Ensure delayed writes are discarded on error to avoid stale buffered writes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of DelayableWriteChannel.DelayedWrites.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use DelayedWrites type in ResultSetReceiver.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed channel field type from Channel to DelayableWriteChannel; added fields for DelayedWrites and directChannel (bypassing delay).

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified constructor to accept DelayedWrites and initialize directChannel by bypassing delay.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enable coordination of delayed writes and direct channel access for sending messages.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed setNextRow to send data rows via directChannel and check writability on directChannel instead of delayed channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Ensure data rows are sent immediately bypassing delay, while delayed writes are managed separately.

hunk_descriptions.intent: Flush delayed writes before sending completion or error messages to maintain correct message order and ensure all buffered writes are sent.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed channel field type from Channel to DelayableWriteChannel; added DelayedWrites field and updated constructor accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Support delayed writes buffering and coordination in RowCountReceiver.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified allFinished and fail methods to send messages via channel.bypassDelay(), flush delayed writes via channel.writePendingMessages(delayedWrites), and flush the channel; updated listener lambdas to use parameter f instead of underscore.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Ensure delayed writes are flushed before sending completion or error messages to maintain correct message order.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced local variable assignment of Netty4MessageChannelHandler with direct instantiation in pipeline addLast call.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced local variable assignment of Netty4MessageChannelHandler with direct instantiation in pipeline addLast call.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new class DelayableWriteChannel that wraps a Netty Channel to allow delaying writes until explicitly flushed or discarded.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide a mechanism to buffer and delay outbound writes on a channel, enabling controlled write ordering and batching.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of io.crate.session.Sessions.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To include session management capabilities in PostgresNetty.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed unused import of io.crate.session.Sessions.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Cleanup unused imports to reduce clutter.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed setting of ChannelOption.AUTO_READ to false on bootstrap child options.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To change channel auto-read behavior, possibly to enable immediate reading on new channels.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Simplified channel pipeline setup by directly adding Netty4MessageChannelHandler without assigning it to a variable and removed explicit setting of AUTO_READ to true.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Streamline pipeline setup and rely on default channel read behavior.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of DelayableWriteChannel.DelayedWrites.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support delayed write buffering in PostgresWireProtocol.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the channel field type from Channel to DelayableWriteChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable delaying writes on the channel within PostgresWireProtocol.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified ReadyForQueryCallback constructor to remove the Runnable read parameter.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify callback by removing unused read runnable, reflecting changes in how reads are triggered.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed invocation of read.run() in ReadyForQueryCallback.accept method.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Avoid triggering channel read explicitly here, possibly to centralize read control elsewhere.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Wrapped the channel from ChannelHandlerContext into a DelayableWriteChannel upon channel registration.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable delayed write buffering on the channel from the start of its lifecycle.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed ChannelHandlerContext parameter from dispatchState and dispatchMessage calls, and updated method signatures accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify method signatures and decouple from Netty context, focusing on buffer and DelayableWriteChannel only.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed calls to ctx.read() from dispatchState and dispatchMessage methods.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Shift responsibility for reading from channel out of these methods, likely to better control flow and avoid premature reads.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed ctx.read() calls from dispatchMessage and updated method signatures to use DelayableWriteChannel instead of Channel and removed ChannelHandlerContext parameter.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To decouple message dispatching from Netty context and centralize read control, adapting to delayed write channel usage.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed ctx.read() call after sending error response for unsupported message types.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To avoid automatic read after error, possibly to better control error handling and flow.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced lambda parameter name from underscore (_) to f in chained listeners after sending AuthenticationOK message.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Minor stylistic change for clarity or consistency in lambda parameter naming.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed handleExecute method signature to accept ByteBuf and DelayableWriteChannel instead of ChannelHandlerContext and Channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Adapt method to work with delayed write channel abstraction and remove dependency on Netty context.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced delayed write buffering by calling channel.delayWrites() before executing queries in handleExecute, with detailed comment explaining the need to delay writes to preserve message order.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Prevent out-of-order message delivery by buffering writes during asynchronous query execution.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added delayedWrites parameter to RowCountReceiver constructor call in handleExecute.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Pass delayed write context to RowCountReceiver to coordinate buffered writes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added delayedWrites parameter to ResultSetReceiver constructor call and removed handling of pendingExecution future and ctx.read calls in handleExecute; replaced with direct session.execute call.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify execution flow and integrate delayed write buffering into result receivers.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: In handleSync, added calls to channel.writePendingMessages() before sending ReadyForQuery and removed ctx.read calls; also updated ReadyForQueryCallback usage and added discardDelayedWrites call on error.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Ensure all delayed writes are flushed on sync and properly discard buffered writes on error to maintain protocol correctness.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed handleSimpleQuery signature to accept ByteBuf and DelayableWriteChannel instead of Runnable and Channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Adapt method to use delayed write channel abstraction and remove explicit read runnable parameter.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed read.run() call after sending error response in handleSimpleQuery catch block.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Avoid triggering channel read explicitly after error, consistent with other changes to read control.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Updated handleSingleQuery method signature to accept DelayableWriteChannel instead of Channel and removed read runnable from ReadyForQueryCallback usage.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Adapt to delayed write channel usage and simplify callback handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added delayedWrites buffering in describeResult handling by calling channel.delayWrites() and passing delayedWrites to RowCountReceiver.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Ensure writes during describe execution are buffered to maintain correct message ordering.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added delayedWrites buffering in describeResult handling for ResultSetReceiver by calling channel.delayWrites() and passing delayedWrites to ResultSetReceiver.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Buffer writes during describe execution to maintain correct message ordering.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added call to channel.discardDelayedWrites() before sending error response in handleSingleQuery catch block.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Ensure buffered writes are discarded on error to avoid sending stale or inconsistent messages.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of DelayableWriteChannel.DelayedWrites.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Support delayed write buffering in ResultSetReceiver.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed channel field type from Channel to DelayableWriteChannel and added fields for delayedWrites and directChannel (bypassing delay).
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enable buffering of writes and direct access to underlying channel for flushing.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Updated constructor to accept DelayableWriteChannel and DelayedWrites, storing directChannel as bypassDelay() of channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Initialize delayed write buffering context and direct channel access for sending messages.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed setNextRow to send data rows via directChannel and check writability on directChannel instead of delayed channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Send messages immediately on underlying channel while buffering writes logically, ensuring correct flow control.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed flush and message sending methods to use directChannel for sending messages and added calls to channel.writePendingMessages(delayedWrites) before flushing in batchFinished, allFinished, and fail methods.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Ensure all delayed writes are flushed before sending final messages to maintain correct message order and completeness.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of DelayableWriteChannel.DelayedWrites and changed channel field type to DelayableWriteChannel; added delayedWrites field.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enable delayed write buffering support in RowCountReceiver.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified allFinished and fail methods to send messages via channel.bypassDelay() and flush after writing pending delayed writes.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Ensure all buffered writes are flushed before sending completion or error messages to maintain correct protocol message order.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced local variable assignment of Netty4MessageChannelHandler with direct instantiation in pipeline.addLast call.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify pipeline handler addition by removing unnecessary variable.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced local variable assignment of Netty4MessageChannelHandler with direct instantiation in pipeline.addLast call.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: Netty4Transport server accepted channel pipeline setup
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify pipeline handler addition by removing unnecessary variable.
